title: Questions from Quarantine: Dealing With Election Week Stress
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine. result.main_content_en: The article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' hosted by Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux as part of the Security and Global Health Project. The series aims to provide advice and answer public questions on maintaining mental and physical well-being during the global crisis, specifically addressing stress related to Election Week. It encourages audience participation by inviting questions via Twitter with the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The content is framed within the broader context of the coronavirus pandemic, public health, and global health security, highlighting the project's role in offering expert guidance during times of widespread uncertainty.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离问题”的每周网络系列节目，由“安全妈妈”朱丽叶·凯耶姆和“医学妈妈”玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，隶属于安全与全球健康项目。该系列旨在在全球危机期间，就如何保持身心健康提供建议并回答公众问题，特别针对选举周相关的压力。文章鼓励观众通过推特使用#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签提问。内容被置于冠状病毒大流行、公共卫生和全球健康安全的更广泛背景下，强调了该项目在普遍不确定时期提供专家指导的作用。
